issues.description: Trigger 'Trigger' is not a valid enum value. Should be 'OnAttacked' (blocker effect activates when opponent declares attack).
Action 'PlaySelf' is incorrect. Blocker keyword does not play the card; it rests it to become attack target. Should use 'Rest' action.
Missing condition or action modifier to represent 'you may' (optional activation). Current DSL lacks conditional logic for optional effects.
